is a park attraction featured at on 24 April 2026. https://www.eva-info.jp/26323 

Overview

Enter the world of Evangelion on Japan's only 8K giant dome screen! The ultra-high definition images with a 180-degree field of view are perfectly synchronized with the ride's movements, wind, and vibrations. Experience the ultimate ride Attraction as you experience the fierce battle with the Angels, plummets and floating sensations with your whole body! https://x.com/HTB_official/status/1981224349509308571 

A completely original story exclusive to Huis Ten Bosch. An authentic European style landscape suddenly becomes the stage for a fierce battle! Here at Huis Ten Bosch, you can fall into the illusion of being caught up in a real battle, with overwhelming power and realism that can only be found here in the world. https://english.huistenbosch.co.jp/evangelion/
